539:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
540:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
541:     try {
542:       const { data, error } = await supabase
543:         .from('website_pooja_products')
544:         .select('*')
545:         .eq('is_published', true)
546:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
547: 
548:       if (error) throw error;
549:       if (data) {
550:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
551:           id: item.id,
552:           name: item.name,
553:           description: item.description,
554:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
555:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
556:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
557:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
558:           image: item.image || '📿',
559:           category: item.category,
